testcase.name: E2E connectors page › source pytest file is empty (no scenarios to port)
E2E assist conversation verification › verify Assist displays conversation results
Username presentation on Assist page › Verify current user's username is displayed in Assist welcome message
E2E audio page › audio page loads and shows files count for today
E2E audio page › uploaded audio file name is truncated to 38 chars in table view

E2E history page › Verify admin user can open full History page and search existing conversations
E2E home smoke › base url opens login page
E2E home smoke › login page has visible form and non-empty title
Login process › Verify login fails with invalid username
Login process › Verify login fails with invalid password
Login process › Verify user can log in with valid credentials

E2E media page › source pytest file is empty (no scenarios to port)
E2E sidebar navigation › sidebar navigation for regular user
E2E sidebar navigation › admin section is hidden for regular user
E2E sidebar navigation › admin submenu navigation for admin user
E2E sidebar navigation › sidebar toggle › collapse and expand (regular)
E2E sidebar navigation › sidebar toggle › collapse and expand (admin)
Username presentation on sidebar. › Verify current user's username is displayed in Sidebar
E2E settings page › Verify current user's username is displayed in User Settings
